training_status: Heavy weight training, incline walking, HIIT workouts

benefits.description: Uses MOTS-C as part of a cutting protocol alongside diet and exercise

protocol_notes: Recommends MOTS-C 5mg 3x/week before workouts as part of a cutting stack. Also mentions considering HGH, GHSPs, and TRT if numbers call for it. Eats at least 200g protein, cuts calories, includes fibrous or pre-workout carbs.
